version_description:
v0: Initial New Patient sub-agent

=== Flow Structure ===
- 29 nodes, 18 components (14 scheduling + 4 global infrastructure)
- 1 flow-level tool (get_time_context)
- Default dynamic variables: appointment_for=self, is_patient_new=true, prev_node='', has_visited_emergency_flow=false, emergency_exit_reason='', has_visited_transfer_to_human_flow=false, tth_exit_reason='', transfer_reason=''

=== Scheduling Components (14) ===
[SA] Name → [SA] DOB → [SA] Callback → [SA] Email → [SA] Address → [SAN] Insurance Coverage → [SA] Reason for Care → [SA] Provider Type → [SA] Referral Source → [SA] Current Medications → [SA] Medical History → [SAN] Provider Preference → [SAN] Schedule Preference → [SAN] Finalization

=== Global Infrastructure ===
- Emergency Detection (ED): global trigger, active emergencies → silent end node (np-end-ed), non-active → Back to Normal → Router
- Transfer To Human (TTH): global trigger, callback → Callback Promise → end, end_call → End Call component → end, continue → Back to Normal → Router
- End Call: global end node with 3-tier instruction (emergency/measured/warm)
- Callback Promise: handles callback arrangement before ending

=== Routing Layer ===
- NP Router (np-router): hub-and-spoke routing on prev_node for all 14 components
- Back to Normal Flow Split (np-back-to-normal): routes to Router if prev_node != '', else to Return to Base
- Callback Logic Split (np-cb-logic-split): routes callback exits to Callback Promise or End Call
- Return to Base (np-return-to-base): agent_swap back to Base Agent after finalization

=== Exit Paths ===
- np-ev-complete: sets has_completed_sa_flow=true, routes to agent_swap return
- np-end-tth: silent end for TTH exits
- np-end-ed: silent end for ED end_call exits
- np-end-cb: silent end for callback exits

=== Prompt Updates (vs Base Agent originals) ===
- Name, DOB, Callback, Email, Address fallbacks: removed 'general services' offer
- [SAN] Finalization: conversational summary style (no name/DOB repetition)

=== Consistency Fixes Applied ===
- ED exit routing: end_call → silent np-end-ed (not global End Call)
- Removed redundant validate_email from flow-level tools (embedded in Email component)
- TTH EV node transitions: equation-type conditions on tth_exit_reason extraction

=== Test Results (14 dedicated tests) ===
- [Happy Path]: 3/3 pass
- [Fallback]: 3/3 pass
- [Correction]: 2/2 pass
- [Edge Case]: 2/2 pass
- [ED]: 1/1 pass
- [TTH]: 1/1 pass
- [Callback]: 2/2 pass
- Overall: 14/14 pass (100%)
